query:
-- فحص مركز التكلفة تولان
SELECT id, name FROM cost_centers WHERE name LIKE '%تولان%' OR name LIKE '%Tolan%';

-- فحص المجموعات في مركز تولان
SELECT g.id, g.name, g.cost_center_id, cc.name as cost_center_name 
FROM groups g
LEFT JOIN cost_centers cc ON g.cost_center_id = cc.id
WHERE cc.name LIKE '%تولان%' OR cc.name LIKE '%Tolan%'
LIMIT 10;

-- فحص العمال في مركز تولان
SELECT w.id, w.name, w.group_id, g.name as group_name
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN groups g ON w.group_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN cost_centers cc ON g.cost_center_id = cc.id
WHERE cc.name LIKE '%تولان%' OR cc.name LIKE '%Tolan%'
LIMIT 10;

-- فحص بيانات الحضور لمركز تولان (آخر 30 يوم)
SELECT ae.id, ae.worker_id, w.name, ae.check_in, ae.check_out, ae.work_date
FROM attendance_events ae
LEFT JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN groups g ON w.group_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN cost_centers cc ON g.cost_center_id = cc.id
WHERE (cc.name LIKE '%تولان%' OR cc.name LIKE '%Tolan%')
AND ae.work_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY ae.work_date DESC
LIMIT 20;
